description:
Sample integration jobs for Fiserv DNA core banking: a simulated account inquiry and a simulated transaction extract, plus the base-URL variable they read.

This is **sample catalog content** used to exercise the marketplace. The jobs run as-is (they log a simulated result); replace the script bodies with real DNA API calls using the connection you supply.

requiredCredentials.name: DNA API
requiredCredentials.note: Base URL + service account. Not bundled - supply your own when wiring the scripts to a real DNA instance.

changelog.notes: Initial release: simulated account-inquiry and transaction-extract sample jobs with a real install bundle.
